strengths: 17 years of software engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure domains exceeds the 15-year requirement
Current role at re:cinq includes AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators, demonstrating emerging expertise in AI tooling and agentic workflows
Founded and maintains GISCollective open-source platform, showing technical vision, product ownership, and ability to attract users for a complex geospatial system
concerns: No Master's or PhD in AI-related field; AI expertise appears recent and limited to infrastructure/tooling rather than demonstrated product or platform success
Current title is Staff Engineer, not director-level; resume lacks evidence of strategic advisory work with customers or director-level organizational influence

Missing demonstrated expertise in AI product innovation and cloud platform strategy; GISCollective is geo-data focused, not AI-focused, and other projects are primarily testing utilities and libraries
response.justification: Bogdan is a skilled, well-rounded engineer with 17 years of experience and strong software craftsmanship fundamentals. His current role touches AI-agent infrastructure, which is relevant but not yet established as core expertise. However, the position requires a director-level Principal Engineer with demonstrated AI strategy success and deep cloud/platform expertise for advising strategic customers. His background is primarily hands-on technical engineering rather than strategic leadership, and his AI involvement lacks evidence of built products, platforms, or advisory experience. While he has the technical foundation to develop into this role, he appears underleveled for immediate director-level impact in AI strategy.
